examples: There was a complimentary basket of fruit in our room.
He saw the dog's twitching nose poke out of the basket.
The dollar has fallen 6.5 percent this year against a basket of currencies from its largest trading partners.
Stumble across a hand-blown glass candy dish in Italy or a basket maker in rural Ohio?
He passes me a wicker basket of hay and shows me how to swing it on my shoulder.
